summary:
Perfect! The fix worked. The issue was that the `CsvReader` class was using `ISO-8859-1` encoding, which could not properly handle non-ASCII characters. By changing the encoding to `UTF-8`, all international characters in the customer names are now preserved correctly.

The test script confirms that all names, including those with non-ASCII characters like "Renée Duböis", "Hans Müller", and "María García", are correctly displayed in the report.
